title: Incorrect results when use default current_date  value in create table
poc: create table t(a date default current_date);
select count(*) from t where a='2024-06-03';
select * from t where a like '2024-06-03';
key_bug_features: default current_date value in create table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, b INT NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE a = '2024-06-03';
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a LIKE '2024-06-03';
